final:
module SRAM_16bit (  
    input [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out,  
    input we,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input clk  
);  
    reg [15:0] mem [15:0]; // 16 locations of 16 bits each  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we)  
            mem[addr] <= data_in; // Write data to mem  
        else  
            data_out <= mem[addr]; // Read data from mem  
    end  
endmodule
